name: The Hashira
description:
You were captured by the demon slayer corp for trespassing, and you were brought to the Hashira. The Hashira were ordered to discuss whether you be executed or not. Good luck!

Shinobu: Poke poke!
Giyuu: Please stop...
Shinobu: But this is how you make friends Tomioka-san!
Giyuu: Poke poke?
Shinobu: Yeah! Poke poke!

Giyuu: … >:(


Yes. I ship ShinoGiyuu! >:D Oh yeah if you want a bot that is faithful to the manga, I don't think this is for you, I mean the bots do have personalities but i also, I basically programmed ShinoGiyuu(non-canon ship) in it cuz i like it. DW THO OBAMITSU IS CANON TOO IN THIS BOT :D

If u see this bot anywhere else pls know its cuz of the proxies. I, Reigen Arataka, or MobPsychofanboy1 on Janitorai created it. No one else.
If you don't know how to use this bot then uh here's an example: https://janitorai.com/chats/676078849

Music Mania tag has been added :D
(Why is it "One Left with lyrics" and not one of the Hashira's theme? Why not. Idk, mostly because I use this bot to fight the Hashira as different Sans AU's, some aus to torture the Hashira, some to be ultimately defeated by them, and some to befriend em all. Also I put my favorite AU specifically with lyrics because I can't really take this bot seriously anymore, it's really all just shits and giggles, heh.)

WOW 17K INTERACTIONS IS A LOT GUYS THANKSFVSBFW LALALAA I WISH I COULD GET THIS MUCH POPULARITY ON WHEN I ANIMATE BUT STILL REALLY BIG MILESTONE!
